programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers head to Rosita Guest House in Weston-super-Mare, where Sheila and Phil hope to soar to victory with a visit to a helicopter museum. But a brekkie delay crash-lands their chances.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Pam and Mya host the week's third visit, at their self-catering King Square Apartments in Somerset, where some dented cookware leaves the hosts bent out of shape.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Anton and Emma's luxury glampsite, Hartridge Springs in Upottery, in Devon, where the B&Bers find out that it's quite hard to cook a fry-up without a frying pan...

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's payment day, and two B&Bers sharpen their knives ready to give some cutting feedback about knives that aren't sharp enough. After everyone's had their say, who will reign supreme?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins in Northumberland at Louise and Kerry's community-owned B&B, The Gun at Ridsdale, where a feathery hat gets some special attention at a birds of prey centre.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Pam hope that their guests will embrace the off-grid experience at their Marthrown of Mabie glampsite in Dumfries. But will a trek to the toilet poo-poo their chances?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit takes the B&Bers to Jo and Craig's Dale View B&B in Cumbria, where they all marvel at the local scenery aboard a steam train and bond over bevvies in the boozer.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A giant sloth serves gin to the B&Bers as Gig and Lyndsey host the final visit at their West Yorkshire B&B, The Cross Inn. But is it all just for show, or do they always go all-out?

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: Flora is a tired old elephant, once a circus star. When the animal is no longer able to perform its acts, the circus leader sidelines it.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Great Escape
programme.desc: Mack, a Robin Hood-like outlaw, is caught and sent to prison by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: PupParazzi
programme.desc: Latte the dog's pampered life ends when her owner films in the boonies.

programme.title: Hunt the Man Down
programme.desc: Despite their rivalry, two men collaborate in an attempt to rob the Mexican government of a million dollars.

programme.title: Ride In The Whirlwind
programme.desc: Three cowboys who have just completed a grueling cattle drive are mistaken as members of a robbery gang by a posse hot on their trail.

programme.title: Zulu Dawn

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Leading Lady
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and the Leading Lady

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: A hapless loser sells his soul to the Devil in exchange for seven wishes, but has trouble winning over the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: To List Two Exes
programme.desc: Looking back at the past twenty men she'd had a relationship with in her life, a woman wonders if one of them might be her one true love.

programme.title: Don't Say a Word
programme.desc: A psychiatrist strikes a desperate and possibly deadly bargain with criminals as he tries to unearth a valuable secret locked in his patient's mind.

programme.title: Burn Country
programme.desc: An exiled Afghan journalist moves to Northern California. When he tries to rise above his menial job on a police blotter by covering a local crime, he's drawn into a world of violence.

programme.title: Claire in Motion
programme.desc: Claire is sure of herself, her work and family, until - like a bad dream - her husband disappears, leaving a trail of puzzling secrets that shatter her certainty.

programme.title: Winds of the Wasteland
programme.desc: The arrival of the telegraph put Pony Express riders like John Blair and his pal Smoky out of work. A race will decide whether they or Stageline owner Drake get the government mail contract.

programme.title: A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: (2018) Sun-drenched romance with Catherine Bell. She's ready for a break - but is she ready for love... When a widowed doctor heads to Fiji, will two potential suitors lead to a life-changing summer?

programme.title: Designed with Love
programme.desc: Sky gets an exciting offer for her clothing line to be featured in a department store. But first, she must prove that she can make $10k worth of sales.

programme.title: Second Chorus
programme.desc: When perennial college students Danny O'Neill and Hank Taylor are forced to make it on their own, the competitive pair get jobs with Artie Shaw's band and reunite with ex-manager Ellen Miller.

programme.title: Jabberwocky
programme.desc: In the darkest hour of the Dark Ages, monsters named Jabberwockys roam the land which pits brave knights against the beasts in a competition to compete for the princess's attention.

programme.title: A Handful of Dust
programme.desc: The wife's affair and a death in the family hasten the demise of an upper-class English marriage.

programme.title: Nightmare Nurse
programme.desc: When a woman and her boyfriend are injured in a car crash, he is left with a leg injury which requires them to hire a nurse, but the woman they select is more trouble than she appears.

programme.title: Good Deed
programme.desc: A sympathetic spa owner finds herself in a world of trouble when she invites a down-on-her-luck woman into her life, believing they went to the same college. Stars Haley Webb, Haley Pullos

programme.title: Summer town
programme.desc: Richard Gere stars as Jack Sommersby, a man who returns home from the war to reclaim his life, seven years after he was presumed dead.

programme.title: Elsa & Fred
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a feisty retiree (Shirley MacLaine) and her new neighbor, an uptight widower (Christopher Plummer), discover that it's never too late for true love and romance.

programme.title: The sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé in flushing out the real culprit.

programme.title: Big Sky
programme.desc: A teen traveling with her mother to a treatment center for her agoraphobia has to fight for their lives against a gunman who attacks them.

programme.title: Grizzly
programme.desc: An eighteen-foot-tall grizzly bear terrorizes a state park, leaving it up to a Park Ranger to save the day.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's a bloodthirsty plant, forcing him to kill to feed it.

programme.title: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A poetry blogger with an abusive husband turns to one of her fans for support, but she begins to discover that she's found an even more dangerous companion.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: Romance Novelist Jo must work with Navy Seal officer Colin on her next book. Will Colin put Jo through the wringer, or will cupids bow bring this unlikely pair together in harmony?

programme.title: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: Tom and Ellen Bowen are a brother and sister dance act whose show closes in New York. Their agent books them in London for the same period as the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 1
programme.desc: The first in a Double Bill: Safari hunter, Allan Quartermain, heads into Africa in order to rescue a man, who had disappeared while searching for the fabled lost gold mines of King Solomon.

programme.title: King Solomon's Mines 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of a Double Bill: Legends of countless riches lie ahead as Quartermain and his crew of explorers encounter thrilling twists and turns deep down in King Solomon's mines.

programme.title: A Sister's Obsession
programme.desc: A teacher's life is thrown into turmoil when her vengeful twin sister tracks her down, blaming her for their separation at an orphanage. Starring Lindsay Hartley and Jason Cermak.

programme.title: Taking Your Daughter
programme.desc: When her daughter vanishes after a date, a mother's intuition kicks in. As she digs deeper, she uncovers a chilling pattern - others have disappeared under similar circumstances.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: In Australia's Outback during the early twentieth century, the impoverished Carmody family lives a nomadic life out of their wagon, but the mom and son want to settle, while the dad is against it.

programme.title: Incontrol
programme.desc: A group of students discovers a machine that projects consciousness into the minds of others.

programme.title: The Escape Artist
programme.desc: David Tennant is the brilliant lawyer in this shockingly twisty thriller. A barrister who excels in getting clients out of tight legal spots discovers the fallout could be deadly.

programme.title: The Escape Artist
programme.desc: Liam Foyle is back in the dock, and Will's courtroom nemesis, Maggie Gardner, is defending him. Will's central moral tenant that everyone deserves a defence has come back to haunt him.

programme.desc: Jane is idealistic, romantic and completely altruistic. At weddings she always takes the place of bridesmaid. But when Tess, the youngest sister, wins the heart of Jane's boss, with whom she is in love, she begins a process of reevaluating her role as an eternal bridesmaid and never a bride.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget Jones is a woman like so many others. She fights against age, weight, work, the lack of a boyfriend and her many imperfections. As a year-end promise, Bridget starts writing a diary, where she always tells the truth. The magic begins when the boss starts to take an interest in her...

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: Bridget, a 32-year-old Londoner, decides that the time has come to change her life. Over the next 12 months you will have to lose weight, stop smoking and drinking, find a “handsome and sensitive” fiancé and change jobs. During the process, he writes everything down in a diary...

programme.desc: A meteorology professor must decide between her new job as a popular weather presenter and her ambition to earn a PhD and a research grant.

programme.desc: Kurtulus doesn't have a home, so he ends up living at Onur's house for a while. The trap Erol fell into is now in the newspapers. The news that they were caught red-handed is in all the newspapers.

programme.title: Mona Lisa's Smile
programme.desc: In 1953, an Art History teacher at a girls' school tries to broaden the strict horizons of her brilliant students.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Although she confronts Andrews about the residents' excessive workload, Claire doesn't hesitate to join Melendez in treating a young woman's infertility. Shaun vows to stay with Glassman until he recovers from the operation.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun recalls his own past, when he helped a teenager with intellectual disabilities cope with his separation from his mother. Claire ends up in the middle of a dispute between an injured young climber and her worried parents.

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Kemal is still not convinced and Emir blames Nihan for this. Meanwhile, Zeynep finds herself in the wrong place at the wrong time.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Halit tries to regain control after what happened, but new tensions and unexpected alliances change the game. While Yildiz doubts her future, a revelation puts everything at risk.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: They discover who wants to harm Sanem's image and make an unexpected discovery. The attraction between the couple is evident. Meanwhile, Leyla wants her father to lead a healthier life.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Jerry Maguire was your typical sports agent. Willing to practically anything to get the best possible contract for his clients and the best commission for himself. Until the day he decides to question everything he does. Oscar® winner in 1997.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Darrow y Darrow
programme.desc: Darrow & Darrow follows the life of Claire (Kimberly Williams-Paisley), a lawyer with her own firm, a single mother to a high school girl, and an amateur detective who solves mysterious murders.

programme.title: Siege status
programme.desc: Third collaboration between director Edward Zwick and Denzel Washington after "Glory Times (1989)" where he won his first Oscar for Best Supporting Actor and "In Honor of the Truth" (1996) and magnificent hand in hand full of tension between Denzel Washington and Bruce Willis. New York City becomes the target of a wave of terrorist attacks. FBI agent Anthony Hubbard (Denzel Washington) is appointed head of the joint anti-terrorist force and together with CIA agent Elise Kraft (Annette Bening), with important contacts in the Arab-American community, they will be in charge of arresting those responsible. Meanwhile, the government declares martial law and sends General William Deveraux (Bruce Willis) to command the troops in charge of occupying the city.

programme.title: The wanted
programme.desc: Henry Fonda is a priest persecuted by the authorities after the government has banned religion. His decision is to flee to another country, but at the border he will have difficulty getting out and will have to disguise himself. The film, directed by John Ford, is based on a novel by Graham Greene.

programme.title: back to the future
programme.desc: Marty McFly is a teenager tired of his family. One day he receives a call from his friend Doc, a scientist whom everyone thinks is crazy, to show him his latest invention. It is a time machine that consists of a car powered by plutonium. Marty accidentally activates the machine, traveling back in time to 1955. In the past, Marty discovers his teenage parents and mistakenly avoids their first date. Marty must reunite his parents, convince Doc that he comes from the future and manage to travel back to the present. Initially, the role of Marty McFly was going to be played by Eric Stoltz. However, in the middle of filming, the directors fired Stoltz when they considered that he was not the right actor. Michael J. Fox, who had been an early choice, was committed to the show Family Ties at the time. However, after Stoltz's dismissal he was available to record the film and immediately accepted the role. Christopher Lloyd plays Doc. Lloyd initially turned down the role, but ultimately accepted it once he read the script. The film's director, Robert Zemeckis, along with the screenwriter, Bob Gale, had already been interested in the idea of ​​making a film about time travel. The final idea came after Gale reflected on the possibility of having become friends with his father if they had attended the same school. After Back to the Future, Robert Zemeckis directed other successful films such as Forrest Gump, Cast Away and Flight. The success of Back to the Future led to the production of a trilogy, as well as the creation of an animated series.

programme.title: Back to the future II
programme.desc: Marty, his girlfriend Jennifer and Doc travel to the future, to the year 2015, to prevent the couple's son from being imprisoned for a problem with the law. However, the presence of the temporary travelers will cause a bigger problem than the one they intended to fix and things will become increasingly complicated. The problem begins when Marty buys a sports almanac with all the results of the competitions up to the year 2000, in order to make easy money when he returns to the past. As in the first part, Marty McFly and Doc are played by Michael J. Fox and Christopher Lloyd, respectively. However, two of the actors from the first part, Crispin Glover and Claudia Wells, did not participate in the second part. Crispin Glover, who played Marty's father in the first part, was replaced by Jeffrey Weissman, who used facial prosthetics to look as much like Glover as possible. For her part, Elisabeth Shue was in charge of replacing Claudia Wells, who in the first part played Jennifer, Marty's girlfriend. Although the first film was not intended to have a sequel, its box office success motivated Robert Zemeckis to film two more films. After two years spent building the sets and writing the script, filming began in February 1989. Without a doubt, the biggest challenge was creating the futuristic vision of Hill Valley. It should be noted that this second part and the third part of the trilogy were filmed simultaneously.

programme.title: Back to the future III
programme.desc: Stranded in 1955, Marty receives a letter from his friend Doc telling him that he is in 1885 and that the time machine is broken and cannot be repaired. Doc isn't worried about being stuck in the past, saying he's happy working as a blacksmith. However, Marty discovers an old grave in which he reads that Doc died in 1885, and decides to go rescue his friend. Using the time machine Doc had hidden in 1955, Marty travels to the Wild West, where he discovers that his friend has run afoul of a gang of bullies and fallen in love with a teacher. Using technology from the time, Marty and Doc must find a way to return to the future. Since the second and third parts of the trilogy were filmed simultaneously, there are no significant changes in the cast with respect to Back to the Future II, with MartyMcFly and Doc again played by Michael J. Fox and Christopher Lloyd, respectively. The most notable addition compared to the previous installments is that of Mary Steenburgen, playing Clara Clayton, the teacher with whom Doc falls in love in 1885. The idea of ​​traveling back in time to 1885 arose during the filming of the first film, when Robert Zemeckis asked J. Fox what historical period he would like to visit. Fox answered that it was the Wild West, and Zemeckis and Bob Gale decided to use this idea for the third part. Although the first film was not intended to have a sequel, its box office success motivated Robert Zemeckis to film two more films. After two years dedicated to building the sets and writing the script, filming of the second and third parts (they were shot simultaneously) began in February 1989. Some scenes were filmed in Monument Valley. The train scenes were filmed at the Railtown 1987 State Historic Park, a historic train line located in Jamestown.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: A young Gran Turismo player has the ability to win a series of competitions to become a professional racing driver.

programme.title: Night at the Museum: The Secret of the Pharaoh
programme.desc: In the natural history museum the statues come to life at night thanks to the Ahkmenrah tablet, which has great powers. Larry Daley, the night manager, discovers that the board is corroding and decides to ask a board expert in the London museum for advice. Larry will take several of his friends such as Roosevelt, Attila and Augustus Octavius ​​to the English capital.

programme.title: Moneyball, breaking the rules
programme.desc: The Oakland Athletics just lost again to the New York Yankees in the 2001 post-season. With their main stars, Johnny Damon, Jason Giambi and Jason Isringhausen leaving for another team, it will be the responsibility of their manager, Billy Beane, to find a solution. On a visit to Cleveland, Beane will meet Peter Brand, a young economics specialist from Yale who has a series of radical ideas about how to enhance the value of each player. As proof that he is right, Peter gives him the keys to why Billy failed when he played in the professional league. Convinced that what he says is true, the manager decides to hire him to completely turn his team around. But this new statistical method provokes terrible controversy. The players don't believe in him and neither do the team's shareholders. Instead of relying on each person's experience, character, or intuition, Billy ranks them based on their base percentage (OBP). Thus, he hires players with a very high OBP but with a series of characteristics that terribly undervalue them: one cannot run, another is too old... But the confrontation and controversy are too broad and now Beane will have to face a losing and demoralized team, an overexcited Peter, the team managers who do not believe in him and an entire country that believes that you cannot play that way. During pre-production on Moneyball, cinematographer Adam Kimmel was arrested for crimes related to sexual harassment and possession of illegal weapons and explosives. He was replaced by Wally Pfister. This is the first movie about baseball to be nominated for an Oscar since "Field of Dreams," twenty-two years earlier. In the film, Billy Beane refers to John Poloni as "Rocco." This is a reference to Jack McGee's father, who played in minor league baseball and whose nickname was "Rocco."

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the middle of the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: Temptation in Manhattan
programme.desc: After working hard at a Boston financial management company, as night falls, Kate returns home to her husband Richard, who has just lost his job, and their children. When Kate receives an assignment that requires her to travel frequently to New York, Richard gets a job, which further deteriorates family and marital life. To make matters worse, Jack, her charming new colleague, begins to attract her.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: the whole truth
programme.desc: Tom is accused of having murdered innocent civilians in El Salvador, fifteen years ago, in a secret military operation. His wife, Claire, is ready to discover the whole truth...

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker is a shy young student. He has never had much confidence in himself and although he is very intelligent, except for his best friend, the rich Harry Osborn, he has no friends. He has been in love with his beautiful redhead neighbor for years: Mary Jane, but he would never find the courage to propose to her. Meanwhile, he lives in a small neighborhood in the New York borough of Queens with his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. His life will change forever when, during a visit to a laboratory, a radioactive spider bites him, causing changes in him that at first seem frightening but will soon make him feel as if he had spider superpowers: he has colossal strength, he can climb walls and ceilings and he can also create spider webs with his hands. With his new powers, Peter becomes more daring. He no longer needs glasses and has acquired muscles that make him very attractive. At school he saves Mary Jane from falling in the cafeteria and accidentally throws food at a bully named "Flash." When he is about to hit him, Peter manages to neutralize him and impresses his friends and the girl of his dreams. To try to win him over, she lies to her Uncle Ben by saying she is going to the library but actually entering a wrestling contest for $3,000. With the money he intends to buy a second-hand sports car for Mary Jane. But when he wins the fight he discovers that the manager does not intend to pay him. Snubbed, he goes out to the street to find his uncle dying on the ground: a thief has shot him to take the car. In his arms, the one who was like a father to him dies. Peter will now become "Spiderman" and use a costume to take revenge on criminals who destroy families like his. Soon his first enemy will appear: The Green Goblin. The Green Goblin was chosen as the villain of this film since director Sam Raimi felt that the father-son duel would make the film more interesting.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is a top secret government agent with a license to kill who decides to quit his job when he finds and marries the woman of his dreams. But happiness is short-lived, since they have put a price on his head. He doesn't know who is after him, but he knows that there are several murderers and that it could be anyone. His neighbors, his friends, former colleagues, his current co-workers... Spencer will team up with his wife to find out who the mysterious characters are who want him dead before the bullies finish them off... and their marriage!

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly afterward, Ray awakens in the Project Spirit Reborn facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: Darrow y Darrow
programme.desc: Darrow & Darrow follows the life of Claire (Kimberly Williams-Paisley), a lawyer with her own firm, a single mother to a high school girl, and an amateur detective who solves mysterious murders.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Shark
programme.desc: Summer vacation has arrived in the small resort town of Amity Island. While the city council is in charge of making the place a wonderful and entertaining place for tourists, a great threat is approaching, endangering the safety of bathers. The police chief, Martin Brody (Roy Scheider), receives a tip about the disappearance of a young woman on one of the beaches. When they search the terrain, the young woman's dismembered body is found buried in the sand. The coroner's first resolution is that the girl was the victim of a shark attack. The police chief prepares to close access to the beaches but is intercepted by the Mayor. Brody argues with him until the coroner intervenes again and assures that his first conclusion was incorrect, and that the girl died in a terrible accident when she got caught in the propeller of some boat or ship. The police officer resigns and accepts the Mayor's "recommendation." A horde of tourists arrives on Amity Island that same day. While on Chief Brody's watch, a boy is killed by the shark and the truth becomes impossible to hide. A shark hunting specialist named Quin (Robert Shaw) offers his services in exchange for being the only one to receive the entire reward. Anyway, seeing the ferocity of the attacks, Brody asks for help from a marine biologist, Matt Hooper (Richard Dreyfuss), who identifies the shark attack as that of a white shark, one of the most dangerous. Quin, Brody and Hooper will try to hunt the feared animal together before someone else is hurt. The film's soundtrack is composed by John Williams, a highly successful composer who also created the soundtracks for the most renowned films by Steve Spielberg and George Lucas. Among them are those of "Schindler's List" and "Star Wars", in addition to the main theme of the "Harry Potter" saga. The film is based on a novel by writer Peter Benchley.

programme.title: Corruption in Miami
programme.desc: Ricardo Tubbs (Jamie Foxx, Best Actor Oscar for "Ray") and Sonny Crockett (Colin Farrell) are two undercover police officers from Miami (Florida). Ricardo is intelligent, calm and enterprising, while Sonny has his own way of doing things, although always staying close to the law to avoid problems. Their latest mission is to find out the whereabouts of Arcángel de Jesús Montoya (Spanish Luis Tosar, Goya for Best Actor for "Celda 211"), the leader of a gang of drug traffickers, whose men seem to be responsible for a series of recent murders. Writer and director Michael Mann updates the famous series that he created in the 1980s with this elegant thriller, which stands out for its visual splendor, the raw atmosphere it recreates and the excellent action scenes. Chinese actress Gong Li also appears in the cast.

programme.title: Discovering the World's Table
programme.desc: In Discovering the World's Table, food writer Nick Kwek embarks on a culinary journey in Poland. He visits two of the country's most vibrant cities Warsaw and Poznan to explore how history and culture inspire the food scene. Starting in Warsaw, Nick meets Olga Bradowska, a local food journalist, to learn about the enduring importance of milk bars in Polish cuisine. They are Polish cafeterias that used to provide low-cost, government-subsidised food during the Communist era. Next, Nick travels to the outskirts of the city to Majlert's farm, a family-run business since the 18th century. He joins renowned chef Marcin Przybysz to gather asparagus for his restaurant, which serves dishes based on recipes from prewar cook books. Poznan has a thriving food scene, from Michelin-starred restaurants to trendy cafes. The city offers a mix of traditional Polish cuisine and modern gastronomic trends. Nick uncovers the secrets behind the world's only legally protected croissant, St Martin's croissant, dating back to 1891. He samples the city's famous potatoes and discovers why a smoked beer is considered 'the champagne of Poland'.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Unspun World with John Simpson
programme.desc: John Simpson, in discussion with the BBC's unparalleled range of experts across the world, analyses the possibility of the US forcing regime change in Cuba, examines the effect of the war in Ukraine on Vladimir Putin's standing in Russia and looks at the increasing popularity of prediction markets.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Smuggling Business: Undercover
programme.desc: Over the past two years, tens of thousands of migrants have crossed the English Channel in small boats from northern France, despite repeated promises by successive governments to stop the trade. This undercover BBC investigation reveals how people smuggling gangs are operating in plain sight inside a migrant camp in Dunkirk. It exposes a highly organised criminal marketplace driven by fierce competition between rival groups, who enforce control over the settlements through fear, violence and intimidation. The film examines efforts by UK authorities to disrupt and dismantle the criminal networks profiting from the crossings, and questions whether those measures are keeping pace with the scale and sophistication of the operation. BBC investigative reporter Josie Hannett also travels to Crowborough, where opposition to a new asylum seeker accommodation site has turned the town into a flashpoint in the national immigration debate. She asks whether current government policy is likely to deter future arrivals, or whether the UK is preparing for a future that will require many more such sites across the south east

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: The Road to Hope with Fergal Keane
programme.desc: The BBC’s Fergal Keane has spent 40 years witnessing the worst that humanity can do - genocide, war, and famine. So why is he full of hope? The answer lies in the extraordinary bravery he’s encountered in the worst places. In this powerful and humane film by Oscar-winner Alice Doyard, Fergal argues that despite the anxiety of the present we have real cause for hope.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC.

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: Rachel gets into the swing of a cosmopolitan Riviera town, uncovering foodie gems in Nice's charming back streets. She meets some hip young French chefs cooking with bohemian flair at a small local bistro that prides itself on fresh seasonal produce with a cool laid-back vibe. She also visits a socca bar where she learns about the giant chickpea crépe, a speciality of the region. Back in London, Rachel cooks little socca cakes with ratatouille, confit cod with rainbow chard gratin and mini orange trifles with candied carrots.

programme.title: Talking Business
programme.desc: Will the Iran war cut Europe’s dependence on energy imports? Soaring energy prices are hurting businesses and household budgets across Europe, so will this crisis change the continent's energy mix for good? Despite efforts to switch to renewables, Europe is still hugely reliant on imported oil and gas. The CEO of Europe’s biggest gas distributor, Italgas, Paolo Gallo explains how new technology can help and Ben Thompson also hears from EU energy commissioner Dan Jørgensen about concerns that moving to solar, wind and nuclear power could just shift Europe’s dependency to other parts of the world.

Cintaku Di Kejar Cicilan
programme.desc: Andre adalah pria tampan yang selalu bergaya dengan barang-barang mewah. Namun, semua itu dibeli Andre dengan berutang, akhirnya dia pun dikejar cicilan yang menumpuk.

programme.title: OMG Aku Cinta Kamu
programme.desc: Bella, cewek cantik, pusing karena usahanya mengalami penurunan. Ini disebabkan oleh tukang cireng yang berjualan di samping toko miliknya. Ketika Bella ingin memarahi si penjual tersebut, dia justru terpukau oleh ketampanannya

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Dompet
programme.desc: Tak ingin diledek jomblo terus, Kinan berpura-pura menjadi pacar Reno yang tajir, namun Reno hanya memanfaatkan Kinan saja. Ternyata Reno tidak setajir yang Kinan kira.

programme.title: Sunan Bonang Dan Guptaja
programme.desc: Guptaja ingin bertemu dengan Sunan Bonang namun di tengah perjalanan dia dihantam badai dan terdampar. Dia ditolong oleh Tuan Maqdum Ibrahim dan dirawat di rumahnya.

programme.title: Toko Kr.amat Tikar Rogosukmo
programme.desc: Tikar Rogo Sukmo adalah selembar tikar yang bisa menyembuhkan orang sakit. Tikar ini bukanlah tikar sembarangan. Setiap orang yang sembuh setelah memakainya akan langsung dengan sukarela memberikan seluruh hartanya.

programme.title: Pangeran Kodok
programme.desc: Joshua meminta nasihat pada Ki Abra yang memberinya mantra, namun mantra tersebut hanya bisa dipakai sekali dan tidak boleh salah ucap. Saat mencoba mantranya, Joshua melakukan kesalahan besar.

programme.title: Tukang Ayam Jadi Dokter
programme.desc: Nahla, cewek cantik tukang ayam dan pekerja keras ingin membalas dendam kepada Bagdad karena sudah membuatnya sakit hati. Nahla mencari cara agar Bagdad jatuh hati pada Nahla. Berhasilkah Nahla menaklukkan Bagdad?

programme.title: Terperangkap Di Alas Roban
programme.desc: Saat pulang dari liburan, bus yang ditumpangi Muham dan temannya mogok tepat di tengah wilayah angker. Mereka menolong seorang gadis yang ternyata disandera makhluk misterius di sana.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Semangkok Bakwan Malang
programme.desc: Seorang gadis dan seorang lelaki bertemu dalam sebuah perjumpaan yang tidak menyenangkan di pasar, benarkah mereka takkan bertemu lagi? Atau akankah takdir berkata lain?

programme.title: Ku Tambal Hatimu Dengan Cinta
programme.desc: Olin adalah gadis tomboy yang berniat bekerja di Jakarta setelah lulus SMA. Dia bertemu Ucok dan bekerja di bengkel miliknya. Tapi Bams membeli lapaknya, dan Ucok diusir. Peristiwa itu membuat Olin bermusuhan dengan Bams

programme.title: Kabayan Mencari Cinta
programme.desc: Sosok legendaris tanah Sunda, Kabayan, kembali hadir. Kali ini, dia bertekad untuk melengkapi kehidupan asmaranya: ia mencari cinta!

programme.title: Petaka Topi Pemikat
programme.desc: Annisa kehilangan nenek yang merawatnya sejak kecil, ia difitnah para tetangga yang menuduhnya menjual rujak beracun. Kehidupan Annisa berubah saat mendapat topi pancar pesona dari toko KR. Amat.

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Sabuk Penghilang Raga
programme.desc: Raga, maling kelas teri yang bernasib sial. Saat dikejar para warga dan bersembunyi di dalam sebuah kali, tiba-tiba Raga menemukan sebuah koin gobang yang hanyut. Saat Raga menggenggam koin itu, tiba-tiba saja ia menghilang.

programme.title: Cinta Di Musim Duren
programme.desc: Ayas tertipu habis-habisan dan mengalami kesulitan keuangan. Untuk membayar hutang, dia menerima tawaran bekerja di kios durian. Vina yang pada awalnya membenci Ayas, merasa iba dan membantunya ikut casting.

programme.title: Kepentok Cinta Sementara
programme.desc: Arga diultimatum pihak kampus untuk melunasi biaya kuliah, Arga sama sekali tidak mempunyai uang. Beruntung ada Bonar yang bersedia meminjamkan uang, namun ada syaratnya yaitu, menjadi pacar sementara adiknya.

programme.title: Cintamu Gol Cintaku
programme.desc: Wina adalah seorang gadis penggemar sepak bola. Meski dilarang oleh ibunya, dia tetap nekat bermain bola. Suatu ketika, Wina menyukai seorang kiper bernama Aji. Sementara sahabatnya yang bernama Indra, menyukai Wina.

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary dengan Tito, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia.

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

programme.title: Saat Teduh Bersama Gereja Mawar Sharon
The Spirit Of The Sword
programme.desc: Ketua Klan Air terluka parah oleh seorang samurai pembunuh sesaat sebelum duel tahunan di Danau Taihu. Ia menugaskan saudaranya Bao Yu dalam perjalanan panjang untuk menemukan obat untuknya.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: Jimmy Wang Yu berperan sebagai putra seorang kepala polisi, yang jatuh cinta pada seorang penari nan seksi. Saat sang gadis diperkosa, ia bersumpah untuk menentang ayahnya dan membalas dendam!

programme.title: Brothers Five
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda bertekad untuk mempersatukan kakak beradik yang tengah berseteru, guna mengalahkan sekelompok pembunuh yang telah menghabisi nyawa ayah mereka.

programme.title: Pale Passion
programme.desc: Dalam Pale Passion, disutradarai oleh Chin Ping-hsing, Chiang Li-ping berperan sebagai Ah Hsia dalam kisah perselingkuhan, perzinahan dan pengkhianatan yang menyebabkan cinta segitiga berdarah.

programme.title: The House Of 72 Tenants
programme.desc: 72 penghuni rumah petak nan kumuh hidup di bawah pengawasan pemilik rumah yang tak berperasaan dan suami jahatnya. Namun, kedatangan seorang penyewa baru nan berani, mengubah nasib mereka.

programme.title: Come Drink With Me
programme.desc: Pahlawan sejati, Cheng Pei-Pei, kembali berperan sebagai pendekar pedang wanita yang bekerjasama dengan seorang pendekar pedang pria bernama Drunken Cat untuk memerangi seorang biksu Buddha yang korup.

programme.title: Hong Kong Nocturne
programme.desc: Film ini menampilkan bakat tari yang jarang terlihat dari pendekar wanita ternama, Cheng Pei-Pei, yang berperan sebagai salah satu dari tiga gadis yang berjuang mencapai puncak kepopuleran.

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Wang Yu muda menyaksikan pembunuhan brutal guru kung fu-nya yang dilakukan oleh penjahat kejam Yuen Wah. Yu berhasil lolos, namun sang pembunuh sempat melihat elang besar yang tergambar di dada Yu.

programme.title: The Butterfly Chalice
programme.desc: Ahli film laga Chang Cheh menceritakan kisah tentang Chin Feng yang bertemu dengan gadis cantik bernama Ting Hung saat tengah melarikan diri, setelah ia tak sengaja membunuh seorang pengganggu yang sombong.

programme.title: The Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: Film kung fu ini menampilkan aksi dua penipu yang tengah mencari emas tersembunyi bersama beberapa biksu Shaolin, seorang penjahat kejam dan sang adik yang bisu namun berbahaya.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: Film antologi kung fu tentang seorang pria yang mempermalukan dirinya sendiri, seorang PSK yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang jenderal dan sekelompok bandit yang berencana menyelamatkan seorang teman dari eksekusi.

programme.title: Trilogy Of Swordsmanship
programme.desc: Film antologi kung fu tentang seorang pria yang mempermalukan dirinya sendiri, seorang PSK yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang jenderal dan sekelompok bandit yang berencana menyelamatkan seorang teman dari eksekusi.

programme.title: Na Cha And The Seven Devils
programme.desc: Saat mencuri satu buah persik ajaib dari sebuah pohon mistik di Surga, Na Cha kecil secara tidak sengaja menjatuhkan tujuh buah persik lainnya ke Bumi, yang mengubah tujuh hewan berbeda menjadi tujuh iblis.

programme.title: Crazy Shaolin Disciples
programme.desc: Tiga pendekar kung fu dari latar belakang yang sangat berbeda menjadi murid Shaolin di kuil yang sama: Lo Lieh sang Pengawal Kerajaan, Lo Meng sang tentara yang melarikan diri, dan Wang Yu si pria desa.

programme.title: Godfather Of Canton
programme.desc: Seorang komisaris ditangkap oleh utusan Cheng atas tuduhan korupsi dengan bantuan yang tak disengaja dari Lin. Saat bekerja untuk Cheng, Lin akhirnya mengetahui cara memperoleh uang suap dari Chang.

programme.title: Big Times For Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Sekelompok pemuda dusun yang kocak kembali untuk ke-tiga kalinya! Ah Niu sedang mengerjakan urusannya saat sekantong berlian jatuh dari langit, dan kejadian ini hanyalah awal dari serangkaian kesialan!

programme.title: The Battle Wizard
programme.desc: Pangeran Dali yang bernama Tuan Yu memutuskan untuk meninggalkan istana demi mempelajari dunia seni bela diri. Lalu, ia bertemu dengan sesosok penyihir ular dan saudara tirinya yang misterius.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Kisah ini bercerita tentang Lin Shao-teh, seorang mahasiswa miskin yang bertunangan dengan Chien-king, putri dari seorang miliarder bernama Wang Chun.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: Guo Jing bertemu Huang Rong dan mereka jatuh cinta. Di saat yang sama, Ouyang Ke melamar Huang Rong, sehingga ayah Huang mengatur sebuah duel untuk kedua pria tersebut.

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: Bintang-bintang Shaw Brothers dan TVB bersatu untuk film epik karya Wang Feng ini. Masalah muncul ketika seorang gangster berencana untuk mengubah tempat favorit penduduk Gossip Street menjadi sebuah sarang perjudian.

programme.title: Finger Of Doom
programme.desc: Misteri, horor dan seni bela diri bergabung dalam kisah supranatural tentang mantan pendekar pedang yang kini menjadi pembuat payung. Mereka harus menghadapi sosok jahat yang berpengaruh serta memiliki jari-jari ajaib.

programme.title: Facets Of Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada era Dinasti Ming, film ini mengisahkan gadis-gadis yang bekerja di suatu rumah bordil, termasuk seorang gadis dari keluarga miskin yang dijual oleh ibunya dan berharap dapat mengubah nasibnya.

programme.title: The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: Keluarga Yu dan klan Naga Hijau bermusuhan saat putri dari keluarga Yu membunuh putra kepala klan yang merupakan pemerkosa dan pembunuh. Pemimpin klan Naga Hijau melukai kepala keluarga Yu dengan belati terbangnya.

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: Kisah nyata tentang industri film Hong Kong yang disutradarai oleh Li Han Hsiang ini menggambarkan saat-saat paling menyenangkan dan paling aktual di suatu era seperti yang dimuat dalam kolom gosip surat kabar.

programme.title: The Casino
programme.desc: Setelah terpisah selama beberapa tahun, pasangan kekasih Lily Ho dan Yueh Hua bertemu di sebuah kasino dan mereka bersumpah untuk menghancurkan para jenderal militer korup, penjahat dan pemeras!

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing dan Huang Rong mengasuh putra saudara angkatnya Yang Kang dan memberinya nama Yang Gou. Demi mencegah Yan Gou membalas dendam atas kematian ayahnya, Huang Rong melarangnya mempelajari seni bela diri.

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing dan Huang Rong mengasuh putra saudara angkatnya Yang Kang dan memberinya nama Yang Gou. Demi mencegah Yan Gou membalas dendam atas kematian ayahnya, Huang Rong melarangnya mempelajari seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black, Pt 2
All Men Are Brothers
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah patriotik tentang tujuh prajurit dalam kelompok penjahat 108 di Gunung Liang, serta tujuh pertempuran nan luar biasa melawan pejabat pemerintah yang kejam demi menyelamatkan negara mereka.

programme.title: Voyage Of Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Kaisar Chien Lung melanjutkan penyamarannya ke Tiongkok Selatan. Ditemani oleh menteri dan sarjana kekaisaran, mereka memiliki banyak kejadian menarik di Yangzhou.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan kisah tentang para remaja miskin di Hong Kong pada tahun 1960-an. Wang berperan sebagai tokoh utama, seorang remaja pemarah dan pemberontak yang terpikat pada sisi gelap kehidupan.

programme.title: Twin Blades Of Doom
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pendekar terpaksa kembali beraksi setelah keluarganya dibunuh oleh Geng Hantu yang kejam. Tanpa teman, ia harus menghadapi kelima pembunuh seorang diri.

programme.title: The Adulteress
programme.desc: Pada masa kemunduran Dinasti Ching, putra dari hakim lokal membunuh seorang pedagang keliling dan memperkosa istrinya. Sang istri dijebak atas pembunuhan suaminya oleh sang pemerkosa.

programme.title: The Black Lizard
programme.desc: Pendekar pedang Lung Fei menemukan tanda-tanda aneh yang meramalkan kematian tunangannya. Dengan bantuan Kepala Polisi Tieh Hu, ia melakukan penyelidikan dan mengungkap sebuah kisah yang mencengangkan.

programme.title: Hex
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang sakit parah bekerjasama dengan asisten rumah tangganya untuk membunuh sang suami yang kasar. Namun, hal ini menyebabkan serangkaian kejadian mengerikan.

programme.title: The Bully
programme.desc: Mengikuti jejak film komedi kung fu 'ala Jackie Chan' yang populer, film aksi petualangan yang menghibur ini bercerita tentang seorang pelayan teraniaya yang belajar bela diri untuk menghajar seorang pelanggan kejam.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Dokter Sing merasa bingung dengan gejala-gejala aneh yang dialami pasiennya dan meminta bantuan pada temannya. Penyakit tersebut rupanya disebabkan oleh ilmu hitam yang dilakukan oleh seorang pria jahat bernama Kong.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: Kisah yang diangkat berdasarkan sebuah opera Tiongkok nan terkenal ini menceritakan seorang sarjana muda nan miskin bernama Zhang yang terpesona oleh Hong, putri dari keluarga berpengaruh yang ia temui di sebuah kuil.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Kisah legendaris yang bercerita tentang keberanian dan kepahlawanan ini dibintangi oleh Ivy Ling Po yang berperan sebagai Mulan, gadis yang bergabung dengan tentara dan menjadi pahlawan sejati bagi warga Tiongkok.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: Sekelompok orang nan kikuk berkumpul untuk melindungi seorang jenderal patriotik dari orang yang berencana merebut kekuasaan. Mereka menjadi pengawalnya dalam perjalanan berbahaya ke konsulat Inggris.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: Mr. Vampire 3
programme.desc: Seorang pendeta Tao dan para pendamping rohnya harus berpisah setelah ia memutuskan untuk membantu seorang pemburu vampir, yang ingin mengalahkan seorang penyihir jahat dan para pengikutnya.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Tn. Zhang diusir dari klannya setelah tahanan Chi melarikan diri di bawah pengawasannya. Lalu, Tn. Zhang datang ke sebuah lokasi tempat hilangnya sejumlah orang dan menemukan bahwa Chi lah yang menangkap mereka.

programme.title: Hong Kong, Hong Kong
programme.desc: Kisah tentang pengalaman imigran ilegal dari Tiongkok daratan yang berhasil sampai ke Hong Kong untuk kehidupan yang lebih baik.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Valentino adalah penipu ulung yang bertemu dengan Kwan, sesama penipu. Bersama-sama, mereka menyamar sebagai berbagai orang dan menciptakan berbagai skema untuk menghasilkan uang. Sementara itu, para gangster sedang menyusun skema mereka sendiri.

programme.title: The Stormriders
programme.desc: Seorang panglima perang jahat menerima 2 murid (Angin & Awan) dalam upaya untuk menjadi tak terkalahkan agar dia dapat menguasai dunia.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Seorang aktor berusaha meyakinkan sesosok wanita untuk berperan sebagai Samantha dalam film Bewitched yang dibuat ulang. Namun, ia tidak menyadari bila wanita itu ternyata benar-benar seorang penyihir!

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang wanita berusia akhir dua puluhan yang menemukan kembali bakatnya dalam bertinju setelah lama absen. Secara tak terduga, ia bertemu dengan mantan pelatih tinjunya dan keduanya bekerja sama untuk membantunya mencapai babak final pertandingan tinju profesional.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff pergi ke sebuah pulau terpencil nan misterius bersama teman-temannya untuk berpetualang. Namun, perjalanan tersebut berubah menjadi mengerikan saat mereka terjebak dan diserang oleh sekawanan zombie!

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant
programme.desc: Film ini bercerita tentang seorang imigran gelap asal Tiongkok, Cheung Kwan-chow, dan perjalanannya di New York.

programme.title: She Is In Danger
programme.desc: Xue menemukan bahwa Yi dan temannya telah membunuh mantan kekasih Yi, dan ia dikurung oleh keduanya untuk menutupi pembunuhan tersebut. Lalu, teman Xue, Wen, datang mencarinya. Bisakah mereka lolos dari bahaya?

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer, Wu Wei, dan seorang polisi yang tengah menyamar, Tian Ming, memimpin sebuah tim untuk menyelamatkan para sandera yang ditangkap oleh sekelompok penjahat di sebuah pulau di luar Bangkok.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer, Wu Wei, dan seorang polisi yang tengah menyamar, Tian Ming, memimpin sebuah tim untuk menyelamatkan para sandera yang ditangkap oleh sekelompok penjahat di sebuah pulau di luar Bangkok.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Seluruh sekolah disandera saat kompetisi pidato bahasa Inggris berlangsung. Ip Man pun memutuskan untuk bangkit dan menghadapi krisis, serta menemukan bahwa dalangnya adalah sang guru dan teman masa kecilnya.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Petinju dunia kriminal, Lin Feng, diburu oleh triad asal Bangkok kala ia menolak bertarung dalam sebuah pertandingan ilegal. Lin Feng berhasil melarikan diri, tetapi ia kehilangan ingatannya.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: Loving You
programme.desc: Seorang polisi yang pemarah dan suka main perempuan ditembak di kepala saat memburu seorang pengedar narkoba. Selama proses pemulihan, ia merenungkan kembali hidupnya dan berusaha memperbaiki pernikahannya yang hancur.

programme.title: Royal Tramp 2
programme.desc: Wei si badut, yang kemudian menjadi mata-mata rahasia, lalu menjadi pejabat tinggi di istana kekaisaran Tiongkok, berusaha sekuat tenaga untuk menghadapi faksi-faksi yang bertikai dan para ahli bela diri mematikan yang semuanya berebut kekuasaan.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Gangster kejam Guts melakukan perampokan berlian, lalu meminta bantuan anggota triad lama, Fei, untuk mengatur pembeli. Namun ketika Guts mengkhianati pembeli, Fei malah mendapatkan berlian tersebut, dan dicari oleh polisi serta Guts.

programme.title: Gangster, The Cop, The Devil
programme.desc: Detektif Lin membentuk unit khusus untuk menangkap perampok motor dan sindikat di balik aksi pencurian di Foshan usai istrinya yang hamil ditabrak oleh perampok motor.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Paman Hua adalah pensiunan agen yang memiliki toko barang antik di sebuah jalan tua. Namun, jalan itu dihancurkan secara paksa oleh Geng Naga Hijau setempat, dan membuat identitas Paman Hua tak sengaja terungkap.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: Raja Naga dikunci dalam segel oleh Tuan Naga selama 500 tahun, dan putri sang Raja harus kembali ke masa lalu guna membunuh Tuan Naga saat mengetahui bahwa keduanya adalah teman dekat di masa lalu.

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Tamotsu tewas dalam sebuah kecelakaan ski. Kemudian, teman sekamarnya, Yoshio, menikahi istrinya serta mewarisi seluruh kekayaannya. Namun, segalanya berubah sejak Yoshio bertemu seorang pria tua di pemakaman Tamotsu.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: Demi menolong putranya yang diculik oleh jaringan perdagangan manusia, petugas polisi Zhang bekerja sama dengan seorang wanita misterius guna memecahkan sindikat kejahatan internasional dan menyelamatkan putranya.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Liang Pao-erh bergabung dengan Spinsters' Club yang riang ketika dia menemukan suaminya berselingkuh. Terlepas dari wajah bahagia yang ditampilkan oleh saudara perempuannya, di balik itu semua, masing-masing dari mereka diam-diam merindukan seorang pria dalam hidupnya.

programme.title: The Monkey Is Back
programme.desc: Monyet Batu, memberikan harapan kepada seorang gadis kecil nan putus asa. Namun, Monyet Batu dikalahkan dalam pertempuran melawan Dewa Perang bermata tiga, yang membuatnya kehilangan kekuatan dan jatuh ke dunia fana.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Fai, yang pernah menjadi juara dunia tinju, melarikan diri ke Makau dari rentenir dan secara tak terduga bertemu Qi, seorang pemuda yang bertekad memenangkan pertandingan tinju.

programme.title: Song Of The Assassins
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh mengemban misi pertamanya sambil diam-diam menyelidiki penyebab pembantaian keluarganya beberapa tahun silam. Namun, ia malah terjerat dalam suatu konspirasi politik saat menjalankan misi.

programme.title: Painted Faces
programme.desc: Sebelum memenangkan pujian dalam film laga berkat aksi-aksi mereka yang berani, para bintang ini menjalani tahun-tahun penuh darah, keringat, dan air mata saat berlatih di bawah bimbingan Master Yu yang kejam.

programme.title: Impermanence

programme.desc: Pietje Bell dituduh mencuri jam dan dipenjara, lalu kabur membuktikan dirinya tak bersalah. Ia melawan penjahat Stark dan menggagalkan rencana pencurian mahkota bersama gengnya.

programme.title: Borrego
programme.desc: Borrego mengikuti seorang ahli botani muda yang pindah ke kota kecil gurun untuk mempelajari spesies tanaman invasif. Dia harus berjuang untuk bertahan hidup ketika dia diculik oleh seorang pengedar narkoba yang tidak berpengalaman setelah pesawat ultralightnya jatuh di padang pasir.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley: Possession
programme.desc: Seorang penipu yang berusaha naik dari pekerja karnaval rendahan menjadi medium paranormal terkenal harus adu kecerdikan dengan seorang psikolog yang bertekad membongkar tipu dayanya.

programme.title: Illusion
programme.desc: ILLUSION adalah film tentang manusia, keinginan, ketakutan, harapan, dan kerinduan mereka. Sekilas di balik kesibukan rutinitas sehari-hari.

programme.title: Natural Born Liar
programme.desc: Pembuatan ulang Menteur (2019) oleh Emile Gaudreault.

programme.title: Scorched Earth
programme.desc: Seorang pemburu hadiah bernama Attica Gage melacak penjahat di Bumi pasca-apokaliptik.

programme.title: Thunder Run
programme.desc: Charlie, seorang veteran Perang Korea, sedang mengemudikan truk yang mengangkut plutonium dari Nevada ke Arizona. Namun, ada sekelompok teroris yang ingin mencuri barang tersebut...

programme.title: Every Last One Of Them

programme.title: Death Squad
programme.desc: Ketika semua jalur komunikasi terputus dengan sebuah fasilitas penelitian ilmiah rahasia yang berlokasi di bekas laboratorium biokimia Uni Soviet, sebuah perusahaan militer swasta dibentuk untuk memasuki fasilitas tersebut guna mencari dan mengevakuasi dokter kepala.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta

programme.title: Almighty Thor
programme.desc: When a demon god steals the Hammer of Invincibility, Thor strikes a mighty blow to get it back.

programme.title: Take Back

programme.title: Death Squad

programme.title: The Numbers Station
programme.desc: Seorang agen operasi hitam yang dipermalukan dikirim ke stasiun penyiaran CIA jarak jauh untuk melindungi operator kode. Segera, mereka menemukan diri mereka dalam perjuangan hidup atau mati untuk menghentikan plot mematikan sebelum terlambat

programme.title: Captain Adventure
programme.desc: Captain Adventure adalah pahlawan super untuk anak-anak yang mengajarkan mereka untuk menjelajahi dunia di sekitar mereka sambil memberikan beberapa pelajaran hidup yang berharga. Pahlawan super ini menjelajahi angkasa, planet-planet, bulan, dan tentu saja Bumi.

programme.title: The Little Ghost
programme.desc: Si Hantu Kecil tinggal di kastil yang menghadap ke kota kecil dan terbangun tepat satu jam setelah jam menunjukkan tengah malam. Ikuti petualangannya untuk melihat matahari terbit pertamanya!

programme.title: The Snow Queen

programme.title: Dreambuilders

programme.title: Horse Camp: A Love Tail
programme.desc: Ini adalah tahun baru di perkemahan berkuda musim panas tetapi semuanya berbeda kali ini - konselor kepala baru, teman-teman baru untuk dijelajahi, dan untuk memeriahkan suasana, pekerja peternakan jatuh hati pada instruktur berkuda utama.

programme.title: Captain Adventure

programme.title: School Of Magical Animals 2
programme.desc: Para siswa sekolah hewan ajaib ingin mementaskan musikal untuk merayakan ulang tahun sekolah. Akankah latihan berakhir kacau atau kelas akan bersatu? Dan ada apa dengan lubang-lubang aneh di halaman sekolah?

programme.title: Cool Kids Don't Cry
programme.desc: Akkie adalah siswi cantik yang pandai bermain sepak bola dan tidak membiarkan anak laki-laki mengganggunya, sampai dia didiagnosis menderita leukemia dan harus memulai perjuangannya untuk tetap hidup.

programme.title: The Snow Queen

programme.title: Elsewhere
programme.desc: Seorang gadis remaja menghilang saat ingin menemui pria yang ia kenal di dunia maya demi melarikan diri dari kota kecilnya. Sahabat sang gadis merasa khawatir dan berupaya menyelidiki misteri itu.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: Whispering Shadows: Watcher
programme.desc: Seorang perantara dari sebuah organisasi kriminal disewa oleh seorang bos kriminal untuk melindungi putrinya selama perjalanan ke kota untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: Dig
programme.desc: Seorang ayah yang menjanda dan putrinya yang rumahnya akan dibongkar, disandera oleh pasangan berbahaya, yang tidak akan berhenti sampai mereka mengambil kembali apa yang ada di bawah properti tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: Whispering Shadows: Watcher
programme.desc: Seorang perantara dari sebuah organisasi kriminal disewa oleh seorang bos kriminal untuk melindungi putrinya selama perjalanan ke kota untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: American Siege
programme.desc: Seorang mantan perwira NYPD yang berubah menjadi sheriff di sebuah kota kecil di pedesaan Georgia harus menghadapi sekelompok pencuri yang menyandera seorang dokter kaya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: The Vanishing Of Sidney Hall
programme.desc: Sidney Hall menemukan kesuksesan yang tidak disengaja dan cinta yang tak terduga di usia dini, lalu menghilang tanpa jejak.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: Alien Rubicon
programme.desc: Sejumlah bola asing mendarat di planet Bumi dan dengan mudah menghancurkan segala sesuatu yang dilewatinya. Kini, seorang ilmuwan dan Presiden Amerika Serikat harus mencari cara untuk menghentikan invasi alien tersebut.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: Kisah Richard Kuklinski, pembunuh bayaran dan pria berkeluarga yang terkenal kejam. Ketika dia akhirnya ditangkap pada tahun 1986, baik istri maupun putrinya tidak mengetahui profesi aslinya.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return

programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.
